name: genexus_whoami
description: Return current KB context, GeneXus install, MCP version, AND inline playbooks for common flows (WWP, popup, layout). Call this FIRST on every session — the `playbooks` block routes you to the right tool without exploration.

name: genexus_recipe
description: Fetch a step-by-step playbook for a named flow (e.g. 'wwp_on_transaction', 'wwp_on_webpanel', 'create_popup', 'edit_pattern_instance', 'add_custom_button'). Returns prereq/steps/pitfalls. Call name='list' to enumerate available recipes.

name: genexus_query
description: Search objects in the active KB. Supports prefixes (type:, usedby:, parent:, parentPath:, description:). Compact projection by default. See genexus://kb/tool-help/genexus_query for examples.

inline_read_top.description: 0-3. Inline reads of top N in response.

axiCompact.description: Default true. Returns compact projection (name,type,path). Pass false for full payload.

name: genexus_list_objects
description: List objects with pagination. Feed nextOffset until hasMore=false. Returns minimal shape by default (name, type, path, parent); verbose=true for full shape.

filter.description: Legacy: matches name OR description. Prefer nameFilter/descriptionFilter.

nameFilter.description: Substring match on object name only.

verbose.description: When true, returns full item shape (default false).

inline_read_top.description: 0-3. Inline reads of top N in response.

axiCompact.description: Default true. Returns compact projection (name,type,path,parentPath). Pass false for full payload.

name: genexus_read
description: Read source/metadata parts of one or more objects. Pass name or targets, plus parts=[...]. Paginate large source with offset/limit. See genexus://kb/tool-help/genexus_read for examples.

parts.description: When set, only the listed parts are returned in a combined response. Mutually exclusive with part/offset/limit.

name: genexus_edit
description: Edit an object part. Pass name or targets (mutually exclusive). Mode: full | patch. Use dryRun before persisting. For WWP screens edit the host WorkWithPlus<X>.PatternInstance — NOT the WebForm of the parent (gets overwritten on reapply). See recipe 'edit_pattern_instance' and 'add_custom_button' via genexus_recipe.

ops.description: RFC 6902 JSON-Patch ops. Supported: add, remove, replace, test.

patch.description: Legacy string replacement OR {find, replace} JSON object. Prefer separate operation/context/content params for new code.

return_post_state.description: Set false to omit post_state.diff from the response (default true).

verbose.description: When true, adds slices (±15 lines around each hunk) to post_state (default false).

name: genexus_inspect
description: Snapshot of an object: metadata, variables, structure, signature. Raw object shape without source text. For source/code use genexus_read.

name: genexus_analyze
description: Cross-object semantic analysis: impact, dependencies, complexity, naming, summary. See genexus://kb/tool-help/genexus_analyze for mode selection.

waitForIndex.description: For mode=impact: when true (default) block up to 30s for the index to be Ready; when false return a status envelope immediately if the index is Cold/Reindexing.

name: genexus_inject_context
description: Inject SDT structures and Procedure signatures of called objects.

name: genexus_lifecycle
description: Build, validate, index, or poll the KB. Long ops are async with operationId. See genexus://kb/tool-help/genexus_lifecycle for actions and target formats.

target.description: Object name(s), taskId, job_id, or op:<operationId>.

estimated_seconds.description: Build: <20 forces sync fast-path (one turn); >=20 (default 60) goes async.

wait_seconds.description: Status: 0-25. >0 long-polls server-side until terminal or timeout.

compact.description: Status: when true (default) returns counts + top-10 errors + warning dedup. Set false for legacy full Output/Errors[].

force.description: Index: when true, clears in-memory + on-disk snapshot and runs a full SDK rescan. Use when impact analyze reports indexEdgesMissing or after adding/renaming objects.

includeCallees.description: Build: auto-expand target via call graph so callees compile before callers (fixes CS0246 from missing DLLs). Default transitive.

buildPlanCap.description: Build: max expanded nodes before BuildPlanTooLarge (default 200).

name: genexus_forge
description: Generate new code or structures from templates or translations.

name: genexus_test
description: Execute native GeneXus tests (GXtest).

name: genexus_create_object
description: Create any IDE-creatable GeneXus object (Transaction, Procedure, WebPanel, SDPanel, SDT, DataProvider, Domain, Dashboard, WorkflowDiagram, etc.). Domain takes dataType+length or enumValues. NOT for WorkWithPlus/WWP — that is a pattern applied via genexus_apply_pattern (see recipe 'wwp_on_transaction' or 'wwp_on_webpanel'). NOT for popups with editable inputs — use genexus_create_popup. See genexus://kb/tool-help/genexus_create_object.

name: genexus_logs
description: Read worker_debug.log tail for error diagnosis or correlation.

name: genexus_sdk_probe
description: Scan loaded GeneXus SDK assemblies and dump a structured map of every public type, method, property to docs/sdk-probe/. Use when investigating new SDK surface or hunting for an entry point. Outputs raw.json + INDEX.md + generators.md.

outputDir.description: Optional absolute path. Defaults to <repo>/docs/sdk-probe/ or %TEMP%/gxmcp_sdk_probe/.

name: genexus_worker_reload
description: Hot-reload worker: copy new binaries and respawn.

sourceDir.description: Absolute path to freshly built bin/Release.

name: genexus_delete_object
description: Delete an object from the KB. Irreversible — confirm=true required.

name: genexus_export_object
description: Export a GeneXus object part to a text file on disk.

name: genexus_import_object
description: Import a text file from disk into a GeneXus object part.

name: genexus_refactor
description: Run GeneXus refactor: rename, extract procedure, or WWP condition set.

target.description: Primary object or symbol to refactor.

name: genexus_add_variable
description: Add a variable to the Variables part of a GeneXus object.

name: genexus_delete_variable
description: Remove a variable. Idempotent. Refuses GAM/WWP+ framework-managed vars.

name: genexus_modify_variable
description: Change a variable's type atomically (delete+add) preserving name and description.

name: genexus_validate_payload
description: Pre-flight: parse + SDK schema scan + would-be diff vs current state. No save.

name: genexus_bulk_edit
description: Apply N independent edits. Item: {name,part?,content,type?,dryRun?}. stopOnError halts at first fail.

name: genexus_apply_template
description: Apply a visual template: kpi_header (title,kpi1,kpi2,kpi3) | empty_state (caption,image) | confirm_dialog (confirmEvent,cancelEvent). Template args go in args.

name: genexus_diff
description: Unified text diff. mode=textVsText|currentVsText.

name: genexus_export_unified
description: Export an object's full state (all parts) as a single JSON envelope.

name: genexus_format
description: Format a GeneXus code snippet using worker rules.

name: genexus_properties
description: Read or update GeneXus object properties. Note: Description is the title-bar text shown when a WebPanel/Popup is opened via .Popup().

control.description: Optional. Layout control name (e.g. BtnConfirmar), variable name with & prefix (e.g. &Alu2RegProf), or attribute name.

name: genexus_asset
description: Find, read, or write binary assets inside the active KB.

name: genexus_history
description: List, read, save, or restore GeneXus object history snapshots.

name: genexus_structure
description: Read or update visual and logical structure of GeneXus objects.

name: genexus_layout
description: Native SDK layout/WebForm operations: get_tree, set_property, find_controls, inspect_surface, scan_mutators.

target.description: Object name alias for backward compatibility.

name: genexus_doc
description: Generate structured docs (wiki, sequence diagrams, health reports) for an object/domain. Not for programmatic analysis (see genexus_analyze) or source (see genexus_read).

name: genexus_search_source
description: Regex/semantic search across Procedure/DataProvider/WebPanel/Transaction source.

argMatches.description: Positional arg index to expected literal text.

inline_read_top.description: 0-3. Inline reads of top N distinct objects in response.

name: genexus_kb
description: Manage open KBs: list (with PID/RSS/idle), open (acquire Worker), close (release), set_default (persist alias to config.json).

alias.description: KB alias (for open/close). For open, auto-generated from path basename if omitted.

path.description: Absolute path to the KB (required for action=open if alias is not declared in config).

name: genexus_sql
description: SQL for a Transaction/Table (DDL) or a procedure For Each navigation.

name: genexus_preview
description: Render preview of a WebPanel via headless Chrome (chrome-devtools-axi). Opens the launcher page, fills required parms, navigates to the target, captures HTML/a11y/screenshot, optionally diffs vs baseline. Returns status + captures.

parms.description: Per-call launcher parms (merged over config defaults and objectParms).

buildFirst.description: If true, dispatch a build before opening the browser.

waitMs.description: Milliseconds to wait after navigation before capture.

diffBaseline.description: Compute structural diff vs stored a11y baseline.

updateBaseline.description: Persist current a11y snapshot as the new baseline.

name: genexus_apply_pattern
description: Apply a GeneXus pattern (e.g. WorkWithPlus) to a parent object. Equivalent to IDE 'Right-click → Apply Pattern'. ALWAYS run genexus_inspect first to confirm parentType — Transaction (family-gen, no template) vs WebPanel/SDPanel (direct-attach, pass settings.template). Other types are rejected. See recipe 'wwp_on_transaction' or 'wwp_on_webpanel' via genexus_recipe.

settings.description: Optional pattern-instance settings (deeply nested config tree from the pattern's settings dialog)

reapply.description: Re-run on existing instance instead of first-time apply

name: genexus_edit_and_build
description: Edit an object then rebuild its callers in one call. Returns edit diff + impact + build operationId. See genexus://kb/tool-help/genexus_edit_and_build for examples.

type.description: Disambiguates when name matches multiple objects.

name: genexus_create_popup
description: W3: create a popup WebPanel with a Form type="layout" body so radio/combo bindings render editable. Spec carries title, description, inputs (radio|combo|text with options), buttons, inParms, outParms.

name.description: WebPanel name. Created if missing; updated if exists.

showWhen.description: e.g. "RespRegProf == 'S'"; emits Refresh event toggling group visibility.
